creator: freebsd@breton.xyz
text:
Python 3.11 is now the default for FreeBSD 13/14/15 on most architectures. Trying to open the ibus-anthy configuration tool through ibus-setup results in the following error:


Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/share/ibus-anthy/setup/main.py", line 1703, in <module>
    AnthySetup().run()
    ^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/usr/local/share/ibus-anthy/setup/main.py", line 79, in __init__
    gettext.bind_textdomain_codeset(DOMAINNAME, 'UTF-8')
    ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
AttributeError: module 'gettext' has no attribute 'bind_textdomain_codeset'


bind_textdomain_codeset was deprecated since Python 3.8 and is now removed. Removing the function call that throws the error allows the configuration tool to launch normally.

This was fixed upstream:
https://github.com/ibus/ibus-anthy/commit/c744be610dff270f1c0f0367f809b9df95aeea2d
